No supplied evidence supports production readiness.

rejected_options.reason: Universal model-gap closure is overbroad and unsupported.
Production readiness is unsupported and full workflows remain blocked.

C1 is rejected because universal gap closure has no supplied support and A8R evidence remains mixed.
